## Query Letter Text

<!-- Standard format: personalization → hook → body → housekeeping → bio -->
<!-- Total length: 250–350 words. Present tense throughout. No marketing language. -->
<!-- Remove this comment block before sending. -->

---

[PERSONALIZATION PARAGRAPH — 1–2 sentences]

<!-- Why this agent specifically? Reference a recent sale, a MSWL post, a panel quote.
     Omit entirely for cold submissions to agencies without known preferences. -->

---

[HOOK — 1–2 sentences]

<!-- The "elevator pitch": protagonist + inciting incident + central conflict + stakes.
     Aim for 35–50 words. Model: "[PROTAGONIST], a [role/identity], must [action] or [consequence]." -->

---

[STORY BODY — 2–3 paragraphs, ~200 words total]

<!-- Paragraph 1: Setup. Introduce the protagonist with one identifying phrase, the world, and the
     inciting incident that forces the story into motion.

     Paragraph 2: Escalation. The central conflict, the antagonist force (person or system),
     and the impossible choice or ticking clock the protagonist faces.

     Paragraph 3 (optional): Stakes + ending tease. What the protagonist stands to lose.
     Do NOT reveal the ending. End on the central dramatic question. -->

---

[HOUSEKEEPING — 1 paragraph]

<!-- "[TITLE] is a [WORD COUNT]-word [GENRE] complete and ready to share.
     [Optional: "It is a standalone novel with series potential." or "It is the first in a planned trilogy."]
     [Optional comp titles: "Readers of [COMP 1] and [COMP 2] will find familiar territory."]
     [Optional: simultaneous submission disclosure if required by agency.]" -->

---

[AUTHOR BIO — 1 paragraph]

<!-- Prioritize: relevant publication credits, awards, professional credentials, or platform.
     If no credits: one sentence of relevant personal connection to the subject matter.
     No fiction writing credits? State occupation + location.
     Never apologize for being a debut author. -->

---

Thank you for your time and consideration.

[AUTHOR NAME]
[Email]
[Phone — optional]
[Website / Social — optional]

---
